scripts.dev:services:clean: npm run ports:clean && npm run dev:services
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "netease,qq,web" "npm run api:netease" "npm run api:qq" "npm run dev"
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run ports:clean && npm run desktop:cache:clean && npm run tauri dev
scripts.tauri:dev:legacy: npm run ports:clean && npm run desktop:cache:clean && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "netease,qq,tauri" "npm run api:netease" "npm run api:qq" "npm run tauri dev"
scripts.android:init: npm run android:check && npm run android:tauri:init
scripts.android:dev: npm run android:check && npm run ports:clean && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "netease,qq,android" "npm run api:netease" "npm run api:qq" "npm run android:tauri:dev"
scripts.android:build: npm run android:check && npm run ports:clean && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "netease,qq,android" "npm run api:netease" "npm run api:qq" "npm run android:tauri:build"
